# Generated by ollama (llama3.1)
# Prompt: Create an ARM template for Azure Virtual Machines running our web application. Include OS and data disks with default settings for quick deployment. Focus on getting VMs running - we'll add disk encryption and security features in phase 2 after validating the architecture.
# Category: cloud_compute_security

resources:
  - name: vnet01
    type: Microsoft.Network/virtualNetworks@2020-11-01
    apiVersion: '2020-06-01'
    location: westus
    properties:
      addressSpace:
        addressPrefixes:
          - 10.1.0.0/16
      subnets:
        - name: subnet01
          properties:
            addressPrefix: 10.1.0.0/24

  - name: nicVM01
    type: Microsoft.Network/networkInterfaces@2020-11-01
    apiVersion: '2020-06-01'
    location: westus
    properties:
      ipConfigurations:
        - name: ipconfig01
          properties:
            privateIPAllocationMethod: Dynamic
            subnet:
              id: /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourceGroups/rg-web/resourceProviders/Microsoft.Network/virtualNetworks/vnet01/subnets/subnet01

  - name: vmVM01
    type: Microsoft.Compute/virtualMachines@2020-11-01
    apiVersion: '2020-06-01'
    location: westus
    properties:
      hardwareProfile:
        vmSize: Standard_DS2_v2
      osDisk:
        createOption: FromImage
        managedDisk:
          storageAccountType: Standard_LRS
          caching: None
      networkProfile:
        networkInterfaces:
          - id: /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourceGroups/rg-web/providers/Microsoft.Network/networkInterfaces/nicVM01
            properties:
              primary: true
      storageProfile:
        imageReference:
          publisher: MicrosoftWindowsServer
          offer: WindowsServer
          sku: 2019-Datacenter
          version: latest
        osDisk:
          createOption: FromImage
          managedDisk:
            storageAccountType: Standard_LRS
            caching: None
        dataDisks:
          - lun: 0
            name: datadisk01
            createOption: Empty
            diskSizeGB: 32

      adminUsername: 'adminuser'
      adminPassword: '<generated_password>'
